title: Lead Investment Banker at National Insurance Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at National Insurance Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
National Insurance Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!
